response.justification: The candidate's current role at re:cinq working on MCP code generators and agentic workflows is almost perfectly aligned with the job's technical requirements. However, the resume does not clearly document 8+ years of AI-driven solutions development—only ~12 months in current AI infrastructure role. Python is not mentioned (required language), and critical qualifications like RAG architectures, vector databases, and specific multi-agent frameworks are absent. A phone screen is needed to clarify whether prior roles involved more AI/ML work than described and to verify Python competency.
strengths: Current role directly involves MCP and agentic workflow infrastructure, matching preferred qualifications and key technologies
Staff-level seniority with proven technical leadership; 20 years experience across diverse domains (web, infrastructure, dev-ops)
AWS and cloud platform experience; full-stack TypeScript expertise; demonstrates ability to architect and build complex systems
concerns: Python not mentioned in skills despite being explicitly required language; only TypeScript documented from required language list
Only ~12 months documented AI infrastructure experience; unclear whether previous 8 years meets 'developing AI-driven solutions' requirement
No explicit mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM performance optimization, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)

key_factors.factor: MCP and agentic workflows in current role
